latest_features: HybridPVP now has a dedicated full-page layout with large switch cards and tuning sliders for AutoPVP
ClickGUI top tabs now default to max size, columns align directly under tabs, and content gap is configurable
WorldDownload now saves under C:\Users\daniel hahaha\, supports surface-only capture, and exposes capture depth controls
Minimap refresh load was reduced and entity dots are stabilized in radar space while rotating
ShulkerPreview now uses a packet-independent live container snapshot flow
